query: SELECT DATE(extractedAt) as d, count(*) as cnt FROM rawArticles WHERE status = 'extracted' AND extractedAt IS NOT NULL GROUP BY DATE(extractedAt) ORDER BY DATE(extractedAt) LIMIT 5;
